original_abstract: The evolution of fifth-generation (5G) cellular wireless networks is driven by the demand for significantly faster data rates, superior end-user quality-of-experience (QoE), ultra-low latency, and improved energy efficiency. This article explores the core emerging technologies that are poised to define the 5G landscape and shape future communication standards. Furthermore, we examine the critical research hurdles introduced by these innovations and address the complex measurement and testing challenges essential for the practical deployment of 5G systems.
humanized_abstract: The fifth generation (5G) of cellular wireless networks will provide considerably higher data rates, an improved end-user quality-of-experience (QoE), a lower latency, and better energy efficiency. This article gives a brief overview of the key emerging technologies behind 5G, their associated research challenges, and some challenges associated with measurement and testing, which all have implications for the next generation of communication standards.
